MA DUKES BRINGS J DILLA TO STEM

20 unreleased tracks now available at https://t.co/aXKOvsLCi7

Cosmic spectrum green skins for Stemplayer available for pre-order https://t.co/LlniFTTe3Y

Silicon forms inspired by carbon life 

Stem is evolving https://t.co/w2ntRDWpP7

Stem works to change how we interact with technology

The devices use hearing feeling and moving

More than reading typing and swiping https://t.co/6d7KkefiQt

It uses a unique active digital micro mirror chip - mirrors the size of blood cells - to create better picture clarity than backlit OLEDs. This makes any wall into a window into a place that feels real and continuous with our human world.
The projector has been designed as a portal. Today we spend too much time looking down rather than up and out. The resolution of the v1 module is 480p. https://t.co/4qk43pF9Ej
“Stem is for the people” via @highsnobiety https://t.co/DPjI3x5xmq https://t.co/2l9HYttu9p

Drop your questions below and tune in this Thursday.

@itswadechile You can connect the Stem Player to your AirPods using the BlueTooth connectivity feature. Hold down your volume up and down button at the same time, while your  AirPods are next to the device in connection mode.
@DBayB85 Here is a helpful guide on how to use the device: https://t.co/XcmY4LI5QN
@dewittsound We have your tracking information, can you please open your DM's to let you know?
@UndenEYEable @KanyePodcast @TeamKanyeDaily We have sent you a DM. We will get this sorted with you, so you can have your Stem Player fully working.
@WillieWilliams @alexnklein Your tracking number comes when the item is on the move. You will get this very soon as all orders are being shipped in the next week.
@UndenEYEable @KanyePodcast @TeamKanyeDaily Hey! What is your Order ID? We can chase with our CS team to get back to you. We're so sorry about this issue.
